summary: Backend engineer with 7 years of experience building distributed services in fintech and e-commerce. Passionate about scalable systems and observability.

experiences.description: B2B payments platform processing ~10M tx/month. Team of 8 engineers.
achievements: Led the migration of the Django monolith to Go microservices, reducing deploy time from 40min to 6min
Implemented transactional idempotency with Redis and PostgreSQL that eliminated duplicates (previously 0.3% of tx)
Designed an event pipeline with Kafka for real-time reconciliation, reducing operations incidents from 12 to 1 per month
Mentored 3 juniors, all 3 promoted to mid-level in less than a year
Migrated observability from StatsD to OpenTelemetry + Grafana

experiences.description: Checkout team, part of Mercado Pago. Peak traffic ~50K rps.
achievements: Built the new checkout API in Java/Spring serving 50K rps with p99 < 80ms
Implemented feature flags for gradual rollouts, allowing bug detection in 2% of traffic before full rollout
Refactored the installment calculation module, reducing user-reported computation errors by 70%
Participated in on-call rotations and authored 6 runbooks that halved mean time to resolution

experiences.description: Consulting, assigned to a US retail client.
achievements: Developed REST endpoints in Python/Flask for product catalog
Wrote unit and integration tests, raising coverage from 40% to 80%
Automated report generation with cron jobs and SQL
